evidences.title: Yesterday, Elon Musk posted 36 times on X. In 7 days, he made 82 ...
evidences.content: ## Charles Awuzie's Post ### Charles Awuzie November 3, 2025 · Yesterday, Elon Musk posted 36 times on X. In 7 days, he made 82 posts in total. On the average, he makes 11.7 posts per day. That’s the busiest man on earth. But why would he make so many posts in a day? I’ll tell you in the comments section. Yesterday, Elon Musk posted 36 times on X. In 7 days, he made 82 posts in total. On the average, he makes 11.7 posts per day. That’s the busiest man on earth. But why would he make so many posts in a day? I’ll tell you in the comments section. [...] View all 6 replies Author Charles Awuzie 2. Massive Organic Reach & Algorithmic Amplification: Frequent, authentic engagement (including replies) fuels social media algorithm, pushing your content to millions without paid ads. So when Elon posted 36 times Yesterday (November 2), his posts spiked and likely generated hundreds of millions of impressions, reinforcing the dominance of his personal brand and increasing the brand loyalty across Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI. So when you think people are trolling him because of many posts, his brand is being established as a dominant voice. 19w 102 [...] 2.5215-.596 4.5312-.596 2.0098 0 3.6605.35...

Popular Posts Blog + Current Events + Fact or Fiction + Sports The devastation of Gaza Richmond Socials Business Inquiries About Me Contact # Elon Musk definitely tweets too much by Sasa 2 Comments This article has been updated with data for 2025: Elon Musk vilifies federal workers as “unproductive”, yet he tweets nearly 100 times a day Since my 2022 article on his tweeting habits, Elon Musk has deteriorated substantially. He’s free-fallen into the alt right, and his Twitter has become a cesspool of racism, transphobia, and antisemitism. Slurs against minorities have surged, and advertisers have fled the platform. [...] Yes, that’s right. Using my method, I estimate that Elon spends ~2.7 hours per day on Twitter.Since late July, there have been workdays where Elon Musk has spent over 5 hours on Twitter in a single day. [...] ## When does Elon tweet? (#top) Again, let’s leverage that timestamp property of each tweet (and Jack Sweeney’s Elon jet tracker) to see whenElon tweets throughout the day. Another crazy chart.
